headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Chubb (CB) After Its Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Run?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Chubb at around US$330 per share still offers value, or if most of the easy gains are already on the table. The stock last closed at US$330.34, with returns of 0.3% over 7 days, 3.5% over 30 days, 6.5% year to date and 17.4% over 1 year. The 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 71.8% and 106.3% respectively. Recent attention on Chubb has focused on its position as a large global insurer, with investors closely following how it manages underwriting risk and...

headline: Unum Group Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
summary: UNM Q1 earnings miss estimates as higher benefit costs and weaker international results offset premium growth and strong sales momentum.

headline: Chubb Limited’s (CB) New Business Grew by 17% Despite a Soft Industry Landscape
summary: Wedgewood Partners, an investment management company, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Wedgewood Composite returned -6.3% (net) in the first quarter compared to the S&P 500’s -4.3%, the Russell 1000 Growth Index’s -9.8%, and the Russell 1000 Value Index’s 2.1% returns.
